falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if at least 3 of 4 metrics pass: PASO-week devaluation exceeds 25 percent, reserves fall by more than 10 percent in about 30 days, Aug-Sep 2019 monthly inflation averages above 4.5 percent, and 2020 base money grows more than 20 percent from March to September while Q4 monthly inflation exceeds Q2 by more than 1pp. REFUTED if 2 or fewer pass.

metrics.description: Official peso/USD rate jumped after the PASO primary shock.
BCRA reserves fell over the immediate post-PASO window.
Monthly CPI inflation accelerated after the FX break.
2020 base-money expansion preceded a later inflation pickup.
metrics.threshold: base money +20% Mar-Sep and Q4 inflation > Q2 by 1pp
